name: Dog Cookies (Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Beef, chicken, or vegetable stock
1 cup Whole wheat or rye (or other dark) flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Use dough cycle.
2. Roll dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
3. Cut with cookie cutters or knife.
4. Place on baking sheets sprinkled with cornmeal.
5. Cover with clean kitchen towels and let rise in warm place about 45 minutes.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 45 minutes.
7. When all are baked, turn off oven and return all cookies to cooling oven overnight to harden.
8. Store in airtight container. (Using a 3.5-inch bone-shaped cutter, I get about 30-35 cookies from this recipe. Sam the Wonder Dog adores them.)
